1.name: Interface
1.description: Allows a Kindred to interface with any equipment she can touch: smartguns, dataterms, vehicles, cyberdecks. The device can be controlled as long as touch is maintained.

2.name: Technical Touch
2.description: Kindred roll Perception + appropriate Ability to gain understanding about a device, allowing him to use, repair, or modify it.

3.name: Empower Device
3.description: Kindred can spend 1 Willpower to draw energy from the air to power a device she is holding, such as a flashlight or a cyberdeck, without batteries or a standard external power source.

4.name: Remote Touch
4.description: Kindred can use any power from the first three levels, but at a range of up to 100 feet.

5.name: Spiritus ex Machina
5.description: Kindred can speak to a machine. If the device contains an AI, it can be spoken to normally, otherwise the Kindred speaks to the Spirit of the object, as per the Wooden Tongues power of Elemental Mastery .

6.name: Ghost in the Machine
6.description: The Kindred can possess any machine, having absolute control over it. Her body remains motionless as though in torpor until the possession ends.
